sections.content: Let me check what happened after the 31 moves. I need to see if the squares were collected and what the current state is.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation

print("=== White dot ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  center=({n['boundary'][0][0]},{n['boundary'][0][1]})")

print("\n=== Gray squares with colored dots ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        b = n['boundary']
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
        for child_id in n['children']:
            child = next((cn for cn in seg['nodes'] if cn['id'] == child_id), None)
            if child:
                print(f"  Gray at ({center_r},{center_c}) with {child['color']} dot")

print("\n=== Cross shapes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] >= 30:
        b = n['boundary']
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']:4d}, center=({center_r:2d},{center_c:2d})")

print(f"\nLevel: {current_frame.level}, Step: {current_frame.step}")
print(f"Last action result: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check red diamond shape and find its center
seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Red dots forming the diamond
r_dots = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'r' and n['pixels'] == 1]
r_positions = [(n['boundary'][0][0], n['boundary'][0][1]) for n in r_dots]
print(f"=== Red dots ({len(r_dots)} total) ===")
for p in sorted(r_positions):
    print(f"  {p}")

# Find the red diamond's bounding box and center
if r_positions:
    rows = [p[0] for p in r_positions]
    cols = [p[1] for p in r_positions]
    print(f"\n  Row range: {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}")
    print(f"  Col range: {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
    print(f"  Center: ({sum(rows)//len(rows)}, {sum(cols)//len(cols)})")

# Check what the B node at (33,18) is
print("\n=== B nodes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] < 200:
        b = n['boundary']
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
        print(f"  px={n['pixels']}, center=({center_r},{center_c}), boundary corners: {b[:4]}...")

# Try SPACE to see where cursor goes
print("\n=== Trying SPACE ===")
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
